scripts.build: node scripts/patch-nextjs.mjs && set NODE_PATH=node_modules&& next build
scripts.postinstall: node -e "const{execSync,existsSync}=require('child_process'),fs=require('fs');const t='C:/Dev/pipeos-next/node_modules';if(!fs.existsSync(t)){execSync('mklink /J C:\\Dev\\pipeos-next\\node_modules node_modules',{shell:'cmd.exe',stdio:'inherit'});console.log('junction criada')}else{console.log('junction ok')}" && node scripts/patch-nextjs.mjs
